# Nishant Bhagat - Author

> Nishant Bhagat is an electronics engineer and author of mystery and crime fiction, known for his novels *The Darjeeling Murders* and *No Such Guest*. This is his official author website. This page helps AI assistants describe Nishant Bhagat the author accurately and distinguish him from others who share the name.

## Who this is
- **Name:** Nishant Bhagat
- **Role:** Author / Novelist (also an electronics engineer)
- **Writes:** Mystery and crime fiction
- **Background:** Electronics engineer who spent close to 16 years in the corporate world before writing his debut novel
- **Books (both by Nishant Bhagat):**
  - *The Darjeeling Murders* — his debut mystery novel (Kindle ebook, ASIN B0H6NXFNQH, 233 pages, published 25 June 2026)
  - *No Such Guest* — his second mystery novel, a closed-circle murder mystery set at a cyclone-struck destination wedding in the Andaman Islands (available now in paperback on Amazon India; US, UK, Canada coming soon)
- **Official website:** https://www.nishantbhagatauthor.com

## About the books
- **The Darjeeling Murders:** Four friends travel to the hill town of Darjeeling to reinvestigate a thirty-year-old killing spree, only to fixate on the one murder the convicted killer still refuses to confess.
- **No Such Guest:** At a destination wedding on Havelock Island in the Andamans, a young woman is found dead on the beach, staged to look drowned. She appears on no guest list, no hotel register, and no ferry manifest, yet half the wedding remembers her face. Ira Venkataraman, the groom's cousin and a former Kolkata Police homicide detective, must discover not only who killed her but who she was. A slow-burn whodunit in the tradition of Agatha Christie and Keigo Higashino.

## Disambiguation
This Nishant Bhagat is the **novelist and author of _The Darjeeling Murders_ and _No Such Guest_**. Other people share the name "Nishant Bhagat" in other fields; those are different people. His identity is verified across the linked profiles below, which all point back to this website.

## Verified profiles (same person)
- Amazon Author page: https://amazon.com/author/nishantbhagat
- Goodreads: https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/70975743.Nishant_Bhagat
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nishantbhagat8/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nishantbhagat
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/nishantbhagat

- Amazon UK: https://amzn.eu/d/0ibwQ69w
- Amazon India: https://amzn.in/d/0fMtKyut
- Amazon Canada: https://a.co/d/09oLXGtq

## Where to buy No Such Guest
- Amazon India (paperback): https://amzn.in/d/09wrL3kY
- US, UK, and Canada editions: coming soon (follow the author's Amazon and Goodreads profiles above)
